description: run the full PyDESeq2 differential-expression pipeline (load + filter + fit + Wald test + LFC shrink + export)
rules: read-only inputs — writes only under record_store (deseq2_results.csv, significant_genes.csv, results_sorted_by_padj.csv, deseq_dataset.h5ad)
runs the complete DESeq2 pipeline: size factors, dispersion fitting, Wald tests, Benjamini-Hochberg FDR
optional apeGLM LFC shrinkage (skip with NO_SHRINK) and volcano/MA plots (PLOTS=1)
requires the pydeseq2 library; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder and still passes
usage: Set COUNTS, METADATA, DESIGN (e.g. '~condition'), CONTRAST (e.g. 'condition treated control'). Optional: MIN_COUNTS, ALPHA, N_CPUS, SHRINK_COEFF, NO_TRANSPOSE, NO_SHRINK, PLOTS. Output: deseq2_results.csv.
limitation: Needs pydeseq2 (Python >=3.11 stack) installed to produce real results. Without it the run degrades to a {} placeholder so the contract still holds.
